title: Sticky Soy Chicken with Butterbeans & Charred Courgettes
summary: Transform your Sticky Soy, Ginger & Garlic Chicken Traybake batch with creamy butter beans and smoky courgettes. A speedy leftover dinner that seriously hits the spot.

method.description: Before you begin, make the Sticky Soy, Ginger & Garlic Chicken Traybake batch recipe.
Pick the mint leaves and set aside. Slice the courgettes.
Heat the sesame oil in a frying pan over a medium heat and fry the courgettes with a pinch of salt for 5 mins until golden and tender.
Drain and rinse the butterbeans. Grate the garlic and stir through the courgettes for 1 min until fragrant. Tip in the butterbeans and cook for 2-3 mins until warmed through.
Meanwhile, reheat the Sticky Soy, Ginger & Garlic Chicken Traybake leftovers in a pan or microwave until hot and sticky. Slice into the chicken into strips.

Squeeze the juice of the lemon into the butterbeans and give it a good stir. Spoon the bean mix into bowls, top with chicken and green beans from the traybake, mint leaves and a nice dollop of sambal, if using.

chefs.name: Jodie Nixon
chefs.summary: Jodie is a recipe writer, Mob food producer, and professional snacker. When she's not recreating all your childhood classics, she's creating delicious veg-forward dishes that'll prove you don't always need meat to have a good time. She's one hell of a talented cook.
